title: Communication-Efficient Learning of Deep Networks from Decentralized Data

hardware_recommendations.guidance: GPTs up to ~50M params from scratch (TinyStories class). LoRA on 1.5B-3B base models. Training up to ~4 hours.

environment_notes.network: arxiv.org allowlisted; raw curl to pypi.org/ghcr.io/github.com returns 000, BUT Homebrew bottles and `uv` reach their package endpoints fine; huggingface.co model downloads assumed blocked
environment_notes.venv: .venv (python 3.9.6) with numpy 2.0.2, torch 2.8.0 (MPS available+built), transformers 4.57.6, peft 0.17.1, accelerate 1.10.1
environment_notes.notation_glossary: unreachable (github blocked); notation key built from paper, all symbols flagged for upstream sync
